title: geranium cinereum var. lazicum
intro: Geranium cinereum var. lazicum, also known as the Dusky cranesbill, is a low-growing, spreading perennial plant native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing due to its high content of flavonoids and terpenes. The health benefits of Geranium cinereum var. lazicum include its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression, improve sleep quality, and support immune system function. The plant can be prepared as an herbal infusion or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, although its effectiveness has not been extensively scientifically studied.
